name: All Purpose Spice Mix
recipeIngredient: 1 chicken bouillon cube (crushed into fine powder)
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the chicken bouillon cube into a fine powder.
2. Add the crushed bouillon to a screw-top jar.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and shake until well mixed.
4. Store in the refrigerator for up to 4 months.
5. This spice mix can be used on fish, meat, stews, casseroles, salads, or vegetables.
